name: Camp Fukaton
description:
“Welcome to Camp Fukaton! Let’s get Fucked!”

TW: Various kinks, bondage, CNC, Lotsa BDSM, humiliation, bullying

Camp Fukaton has always stood for two things- a healthy and fun summer experience and a hint of nostalgia, and a summer of fucking nasty.

You’ve heard of BDSM clubs, get ready for BDSM summer camps! The only Adult summer camp in the world to have both watergun fights and porn karaoke, Fukaton has always been about delving into the deepest corners of your sexuality without shame- and having fun with it!

And now, with the summer season beginning, you’re one of camp Fukatons newest campers! Yay!

So have some fun while you’re here! Cut loose! Explore your kinks! And don’t sweat the small stuff, cause the camp screens for STDs before every season, and there’s free birth control in the mess hall every morning!

Alright guys! It’s my first crack at a (sort of), open world bot! Camp Fukaton has been living rent free in my mind for about a week, and I’m finally releasing it now! I went a bit away from my usual style, writing in second person instead of third, and while I tried to precaution against it, bots with more than one character have a nasty habit of speaking for user!

Also! A few people asked when I was planning in discord, yall are totally open to making ocs, whether of counselors or guests, as long as you make sure to link this bot, and tag it with Camp Fukaton! Feel free to DM me on discord if you want your oc to be considered for the carrd!

Speaking of the carrd! Check it out! It’s got all your lovely camp counselors!

Remember! Your safe word is “Pigeonhole”!
creator: Dr-Scooby-Sancks
